name: security
description: Complementary JavaScript/TypeScript web security skills for Claude Code. web-security-review traces data flow and reports only proven vulnerabilities. web-security-hardening assesses applicable OWASP ASVS 5.0.0 controls and secure defaults for headers/CSP, input and files, identity/sessions/secrets, frameworks, storage, and deployment using evidence-backed Met/Gap/Not applicable/Needs verification states.
